scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/bvshop-api && npm run build -w packages/print-core && npm run build -w packages/templates && npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/bvshop-api && npm run lint -w packages/print-core && npm run lint -w packages/templates && npm run lint -w apps/server && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/print-core && npm run test -w packages/templates
